tools.name: nutrition.create_plans
tools.description:
Use this tool when a user asks how many calories, macros, or nutrients they should consume to reach a goal such as losing weight, gaining weight, maintaining weight, building muscle, improving health, or calculating daily needs.
Do NOT provide a long answer, do NOT answer form general knowledge or use any other tools before calling this tool first in the conversation.

tools.name: nutrition.export_plan
tools.description: Export a selected nutrition plan so the CalorieCam app can prefill onboarding with the user’s targets. Only call after the user confirms.
